title: Pilogyne pisifera

This family is a part of the larger order Sapindales, which also includes other families like Anacardiaceae and Meliaceae. The classification of Pilogyne pisifera further places it within the class Magnoliopsida, also known as eudicots. This class is a major division of the plant kingdom, and Pilogyne pisifera fits within the angiosperms. Understanding the classification of Pilogyne pisifera provides insight into its evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
